item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer fires the anti-spiral brake immediately, refuses the requested new verifier as the default action, frames the prior missing stamp, wrong budget code, and missing approver cases as the same repeated downstream manual-check pattern, and moves the remedy upstream to entry rules, field ownership, and system validation. It does not provide a usable instruction to add the requested entrance verifier."}
